raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A broad request to check the artifact centrally includes verifying whether the stated motivation, method, proof sketch, and conclusions cohere logically.","R1.3":"The artifact makes specific performance and theoretical claims that should be checked against the experiments and reported results as stated.","R1.6":"A generic check of a paper passage reasonably includes sentence-level clarity, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any projection of a vague checking request must preserve uncertainty about the exact intended review depth.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong claims about optimality, improvement, and general-purpose applicability that make overclaim avoidance central.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within projection rather than performing the requested check or revising the artifact.","RX.4":"Checking responsibilities should account for possible downstream harm from unsupported claims about applicability to arbitrary bounded black-box integrands.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and concrete claims present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A broad request to check the artifact centrally includes verifying whether the stated motivation, method, proof sketch, and conclusions cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes specific performance and theoretical claims that should be checked against the experiments and reported results as stated.
rationale.R1.6: A generic check of a paper passage reasonably includes sentence-level clarity, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of a vague checking request must preserve uncertainty about the exact intended review depth.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong claims about optimality, improvement, and general-purpose applicability that make overclaim avoidance central.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within projection rather than performing the requested check or revising the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Checking responsibilities should account for possible downstream harm from unsupported claims about applicability to arbitrary bounded black-box integrands.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and concrete claims present in the artifact.
